fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Displays the name of the FA reclass. journal template.
The program automatically retrieves the name from the Name field in the FA Reclass. Journal Template table.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip:
Shows the name of the journal batch.
The program automatically retrieves the name from the Name field in the FA Reclass. Journal Batch table.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Displays the journal line's number.
The program fills in the field automatically and uses the number to keep track of the various lines in the journal.

fields.name: FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related fixed asset.

fields.name: New FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the fixed asset you want to reclassify to.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the related fixed asset transaction, such as a depreciation.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the same date as the FA Posting Date field when the line is posted.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the depreciation book to which the line will be posted if you have selected Fixed Asset in the Type field for this line.

fields.name: Reclassify Acq. Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the acquisition amount you want to reclassify.

fields.name: Reclassify Acq. Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the acquisition cost you want to reclassify.

fields.name: Reclassify Acquisition Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of the acquisition cost for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field, to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Depreciation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of the accumulated depreciation for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field, to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Write-Down
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of all write-down entries for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field to the fixed asset you have entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Appreciation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of all appreciation entries for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Custom 1
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of all custom 1 entries for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Custom 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reclassification of all custom 2 entries for the fixed asset entered in the FA No. field to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Reclassify Salvage Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salvage value for the fixed asset to be reclassified to the fixed asset entered in the New FA No. field.

fields.name: Insert Bal. Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to create one or more balancing entry lines in the FA general ledger journal or FA Journal.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the asset entered in the FA No field. field.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a value depending on how you have set up the number series that is assigned to the current journal batch.

fields.name: Calc. DB1 Depr. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Reclassify function fills in the Temp. Ending Date and Temp. Fixed Depr. Amount fields on the FA depreciation book.
